tool_args.label: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) September 2025 route activation
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit, in partnership with NYC DOT, continues to advance bus priority through the deployment of four additional Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) routes—the Q6, Bx20, Bx3, and Bx7. These routes were activated on September 15 under a 60-day warning period. With 43 routes and more than 1,200 ACE-equipped buses covering nearly 500 miles, the program now benefits approximately 775,000 daily customers, improving speed, safety, reliability, and accessibility across all five boroughs.

payload.description: Four additional ACE routes—Q6, Bx20, Bx3, and Bx7—were activated on September 15, 2025 under a 60-day warning period.
